description.value:
Frequency once per day

You can launch a ball of plasma and stellar ejecta across the battlefield that explodes on impact, raining plasma and flame in a small area. Launch Plasma deals @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d6[fire]] damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] within 60 feet. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a critical failure, a creature also takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[persistent,electricity]] damage.

At 7th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the fire damage increases by 1d6, and the persistent electricity damage increases by 1. At 17th level, the area increases to a @Template[burst|distance:10].

Special If you're a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Volatile Novian], Launch Plasma and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Mini-Nova]{Mini-Nova's} damage dice are both increased to d8s.
